cleavage agent: 1:50 mass ratio of trypsin was added to the protein
collision energy: a normalized collision energy was set as 27%
instrument: analyzed by the Q Exactive series mass spectrometer
ionization type: with ion source of Nanospray Flex™ (ESI)
labeling: we carried out a label-free proteome analysis
reduction reagent: reduced by adding an appropriate amount of TCEP
